plugin.identity-ldap.plugin.name: Directory Sync
plugin.identity-ldap.screen.directory.su: Keep one LDAP connector per organization, map external groups, and cache people for local fallback.
identity-ldap.summary: Keep one LDAP connector per organization, map external groups, and cache people for local fallback.
identity-ldap.governance_note: Sync settings stay in the plugin workspace. Directory data remains organization-scoped and the local cache supports fallback access.
identity-ldap.cached_people_copy: Cached people are used when local fallback is needed.
identity-ldap.connector.title: LDAP connector
identity-ldap.connector.subtitle: Configure one connector per organization and keep local fallback ready.
identity-ldap.connector.editor_copy: Update connection settings, directory filters, and local fallback fields without changing the rest of the workspace.
identity-ldap.mappings.title: Group mappings
identity-ldap.mappings.subtitle: Map LDAP groups to roles and scopes that should inherit access from the directory.
identity-ldap.mappings.add_copy: Link one LDAP group to roles, scopes, and active status.
identity-ldap.mappings.empty: No LDAP group mappings have been configured yet.
identity-ldap.cached.title: Cached directory people
identity-ldap.cached.subtitle: The local copy powers fallback email access and scoped sessions.
identity-ldap.cached.empty: No directory-backed people cached for this organization yet.
